The target gases used in this experiment were bureau of
mines grade a helium and electrolytic oxygen. The
stated helium purity is 99.99%.  An analysis of the
oxygen indicated an impurity concentration of <  0.35%.
Together with the 0.2% natural abundance of O-18 this
gives a total contaminant concentration of < 0.55%.
